title: LinkedIn Job Hunt Scraper Input
description: Configure the target job roles, locations, time filters, and extraction limit.

jobTitles.title: Job Titles / Keywords
jobTitles.description: List of job titles or search terms to crawl (related to graphic design/creative fields).

locations.title: Job Locations
locations.description: List of geographic locations to search in.

maxJobs.title: Maximum Job Postings to Extract
maxJobs.description: Overall target limit of job postings to scrape across all search combinations.

postedPast24hOnly.title: Only Posted in Last 24 Hours
postedPast24hOnly.description: If enabled, restricts results to job postings added within the last 24 hours.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Select proxies to prevent blocking. Apify proxy is recommended.
